lever_summary: Exact partial selection for dense TopK when k is small relative to the last-axis length. The previous dense path full-sorted every (complement key, in-slice index) pair by radix before taking k. The new path uses select_nth_unstable_by over the total pair order and sorts only pairs[..k], keeping the existing full radix path for large k.

profile.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- eval/ --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- topk_64k_k128 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

verification_rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- topk_64k_k128 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

alien_graveyard.primitive: order-statistic partial selection / adaptive partial sort
sources: /data/projects/alien_cs_graveyard/alien_cs_graveyard.md section 8.6 database cracking partial sort around a pivot

change.lever: Added top_k_pair_cmp and order_top_k_pairs. Small-k dense TopK uses select_nth_unstable_by(k - 1, top_k_pair_cmp), then sort_unstable_by(top_k_pair_cmp) on the selected prefix. Large-k dense TopK keeps radix_pairs_ascending with lazy scratch allocation.

isomorphism.ordering: unchanged: ascending (complement key, original index) equals descending value order with ascending in-slice index ties, matching compare_sort_keys(b,a).then(a_idx.cmp(b_idx))
isomorphism.tie_breaking: unchanged: original index is part of the total comparator, so instability in select_nth_unstable_by cannot reorder equal values incorrectly
isomorphism.floating_point: identical: f64_total_order_key is unchanged and output values are copied from the original dense slice by index, preserving NaN payloads, signed zero, infinities, and all f64 bits
isomorphism.fallbacks: unchanged: non-dense/non-i64-f64/short-axis inputs return None to the generic path; large k uses the previous radix path
isomorphism.errors: unchanged: eval_top_k validation and generic fallback are untouched

validation.name: top_k_parity
validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib top_k -- --nocapture
